access_list.description: The access list of the wrapped ethereum transaction

address.description: The hex encoded evm address of contract

authorization_list.description: The authorization list of the wrapped EIP-7702 ethereum transaction

amount.description: The amount sent to the function. When `hbar=true` (default), the value is in tinybars. When `hbar=false`, the value is in weibars.

block_gas_used.description: The total amount of gas used in the block

block_hash.description: The hex encoded block (record file chain) hash

block_number.description: The block height calculated as the number of record files starting from zero since network start.

allOf.description: The hex encoded bloom filter of the contract result

call_result.description: The hex encoded result returned by the function

chain_id.description: The hex encoded chain_id of the wrapped ethereum transaction

created_contract_ids.description: The list of smart contracts that were created by the function call.

error_message.description: The message when an error occurs during smart contract execution

failed_initcode.description: The hex encoded initcode of a failed contract create transaction

function_parameters.description: The hex encoded parameters passed to the function

gas_consumed.description: The units of consumed gas by the EVM to execute contract

gas_limit.description: The maximum units of gas allowed for contract execution

gas_price.description: The hex encoded gas_price of the wrapped ethereum transaction. When `hbar=true` (default), the value is converted to tinybars. When `hbar=false`, the value is in weibars.

gas_used.description: The units of gas used to execute contract

hash.description: A hex encoded 32 byte hash and it is only populated for Ethereum transaction case

max_fee_per_gas.description: The hex encoded max_fee_per_gas of the wrapped ethereum transaction. When `hbar=true` (default), the value is converted to tinybars. When `hbar=false`, the value is in weibars.

max_priority_fee_per_gas.description: The hex encoded max_priority_fee_per_gas of the wrapped ethereum transaction. When `hbar=true` (default), the value is converted to tinybars. When `hbar=false`, the value is in weibars.

nonce.description: The nonce of the wrapped ethereum transaction

r.description: The hex encoded signature_r of the wrapped ethereum transaction

s.description: The hex encoded signature_s of the wrapped ethereum transaction

status.description: The status of the transaction, 0x1 for a SUCCESS transaction and 0x0 for all else

transaction_index.description: The position of the transaction in the block

type.description: The type of the wrapped ethereum transaction, 0 (Pre-Eip1559) or 2 (Post-Eip1559)

v.description: The recovery_id of the wrapped ethereum transaction
